text.title: Freelancer Discovery Call Template Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: 30-min discovery call with BrewLab founder produces a 20-score lead and a €4.5K proposal seed.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Operator (freelance ops consultant) runs discovery call with Carlos R. (founder, BrewLab). Pain = SKU spreadsheet reconciliation.

section.title: Output
